✓ serves it · ◐ with conditions · ✕ not served (proven) · ? not verified yet — hover any verdict for the receipt, click to pin it

Notes

Audio streaming: Plays audio chunk-by-chunk as it arrives (e.g. TTS streams) — no full download needed.

Badges for your README

Maintainer of ChunkedAudioPlayer? These are yours — verified claims, linked to the receipts. Wrong verdict? That's a fix we want; see contribute.
